name: Turmeric Golden Oats
description: Warm oatmeal with turmeric and cinnamon — scales easily for the whole family.
recipeInstructions: Cook: Combine rolled oats, coconut milk, turmeric, cinnamon, and black pepper in a saucepan. Bring to a simmer over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until thick and creamy.
Serve: Stir in honey or maple syrup. Divide into bowls and top with frozen blueberries.
